mapper.select: SELECT id, device_id, desired, desired_updated_at, reported, reported_updated_at, updated_at FROM device_shadow WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device_shadow (device_id, desired, desired_updated_at) VALUES (#{deviceId}, JSON_OBJECT('nightLightOn', CAST(#{onJson} AS JSON)), #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE desired = JSON_SET(COALESCE(desired, JSON_OBJECT()), '$.nightLightOn', CAST(#{onJson} AS JSON)), desired_updated_at = #{updatedAt}

INSERT INTO device_shadow (device_id, desired, desired_updated_at) VALUES (#{deviceId}, JSON_OBJECT('alarmActive', CAST(#{activeJson} AS JSON)), #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE desired = JSON_SET(COALESCE(desired, JSON_OBJECT()), '$.alarmActive', CAST(#{activeJson} AS JSON)), desired_updated_at = #{updatedAt}

INSERT INTO device_shadow (device_id, reported, reported_updated_at) VALUES (#{deviceId}, JSON_OBJECT('nightLightOn', CAST(#{onJson} AS JSON)), #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE reported = JSON_SET(COALESCE(reported, JSON_OBJECT()), '$.nightLightOn', CAST(#{onJson} AS JSON)), reported_updated_at = #{updatedAt}

INSERT INTO device_shadow (device_id, reported, reported_updated_at) VALUES (#{deviceId}, JSON_OBJECT('alarmActive', CAST(#{activeJson} AS JSON)), #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE reported = JSON_SET(COALESCE(reported, JSON_OBJECT()), '$.alarmActive', CAST(#{activeJson} AS JSON)), reported_updated_at = #{updatedAt}
